element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns character movement mechanics in early levels
Levels likely require switching between Ren and Stimpy for different abilities

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Standard 1993 SNES platformer pacing with character-switching mechanics to vary challenge

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to Ren and Stimpy platforming mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels likely differentiate between Ren's and Stimpy's abilities, requiring player switching for progression through different sections
